Research, Evaluation, and Planning Unit (REP)
Goal
Develop an on-going, long range planning and evaluation process for MCAH programs.
Mission
To support the MCAH programs to safeguard and improve the health of women, children, 
						and their families in Los Angeles County through quality assurance, assessment, and 
						program planning activities with the utilization of current information technology.
